results.title: Bullpen sends West Point juniors past Wahoo
results.description: WAYNE — A quick response after a rough start allowed West Point to get past Wahoo Medicine Hat Pharmacy 7-3 in the first round of the American Legion Class B juniors state tournament on Saturday.

results.title: Former Titans players participate in ALS ice bucket challenge to show support for Chris Johnson
results.description: Former Tennessee Titans players and people in the NFL participated in the Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS) ice bucket challenge to show love and support for Chris Johnson who was recently diagnosed.

results.title: Death’s door to Springbok debut: Newbie weeps during anthem [video]
results.description: Joyous Celebration singer Pearl Adams brought Springbok newbie Carlu Sadie to tears moments before the team's annihilation of Wales.

results.title: 'We Failed You': Kylian Mbappe Pens Emotional Farewell To Didier Deschamps
results.description: Kylian Mbappe has paid an emotional tribute to Didier Deschamps, admitting France "failed" to give their legendary coach the perfect farewell after World Cup heartbreak.

results.title: Italian‐Ghanaian winger Brian Oddei signs for FC Noah
results.description: Italian‐Ghanaian winger Brian Oddei has joined Armenian Premier League side FC Noah, becoming the club’s latest attacking reinforcement.The 23‐year‐old arrives from Slovenian outfit Koper, with Noah securing a permanent transfer and handing him the number 98 shirt. The club welcomed him warmly, highlighting his pace and versatility on the wing and wishing him every success in their colours.Oddei’s path to Armenia has been shaped by a diverse European journey. Raised in Sassuolo’s youth system, he was first called up to the senior squad in December 2019 for Serie A and Coppa Italia fixtures, although he did not feature on that occasion.He was promoted permanently from the Under‐19s to the first team in November 2020 and made his Serie A debut on 10 January 2021, coming on for Mert Müldür in the 73rd minute of a 3-1 defeat away to Juventus. Later, on 31 August 2021, he joined Serie B side Crotone on loan, before returning to Sassuolo when the spell was cut short on 31 January 2022.His career has since taken him to Crotone, Croatia’s Rudes, Slovakia’s Dunajska Streda and Finland’s KTP, experience that FC Noah hope will translate into immediate impact on the flanks.

results.title: Mbappe starts for France against England in third-place match
results.description: MIAMI: Kylian Mbappe will start for France as they take on England in the third-place match at the World Cup in Miami on Saturday, with both coaches fielding heavily reshuffled lineups.

results.title: Dak Prescott quietly admitted the Cowboys defense cost him a possible Super Bowl run
results.description: At least Dak Prescott and the Dallas Cowboys know what their weakness is.

results.title: Red Sox Urged to Trade Away Star in ‘Tough Pill’ Move Despite Win Streak
results.description: The Red Sox are the hottest team in baseball but could still sell of top pieces like Aroldis Chapman and Sonny Gray at the trade deadline. The post Red Sox Urged to Trade Away Star in ‘Tough Pill’ Move Despite Win Streak appeared first on HEAVY.
